author: your-username
name: download-notifier
title: Download Notifier
description: Sends notifications when downloads are complete

settings.name: notifyOnAll
settings.title: Notify on all downloads
settings.description: Send notification for every completed download

settings.name: notifySound
settings.title: Play sound with notification
settings.description: Play a sound alert when download completes

settings.name: minFileSize
settings.title: Minimum file size (MB)
settings.description: Only notify for files larger than this size
